title: 🔥 Sumatran Orangutan — HIGH THREAT | Wildfire Approaching Critical Habitat
narrative: A large wildfire in North Sumatra is spreading northwest toward critical Sumatran Orangutan habitat, with confirmed sightings placing approximately 200 individuals within 20km of the fire perimeter. Dry season conditions and sustained westerly winds are forecast to push the fire 35-45km in the next 24 hours, making direct habitat encroachment likely.
